ns0:entry.ns0:title: DenverCoder1/github-readme-streak-stats
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DenverCoder1/github-readme-streak-stats
Language: php
🔥 Stay motivated and show off your contribution streak! 🌟 Display your total contributions, current streak, and longest streak on your GitHub profile README

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dolibarr/dolibarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dolibarr/dolibarr
Language: php
Dolibarr ERP CRM is a modern software package to manage your company or foundation's activity (contacts, suppliers, invoices, orders, stocks, agenda, accounting, ...). it's an open source Web application (written in PHP) designed for businesses of any sizes, foundations and freelancers.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FreshRSS/FreshRSS
Language: php
A free, self-hostable news aggregator…

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Leantime/leantime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Leantime/leantime
Language: php
Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MlgmXyysd/Xiaomi-HyperOS-BootLoader-Bypass
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MlgmXyysd/Xiaomi-HyperOS-BootLoader-Bypass
Language: php
A PoC that exploits a vulnerability to bypass the Xiaomi HyperOS community restrictions of BootLoader unlocked account bindings.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/wordpress-develop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop
Language: php
WordPress Develop, Git-ified. Synced from git://develop.git.wordpress.org/, including branches and tags! This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please include a link to a pre-existing ticket on https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ with every pull request.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: assimon/dujiaoka
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/assimon/dujiaoka
Language: php
🦄独角数卡(自动售货系统)-开源站长自动化售货解决方案、高效、稳定、快速！🚀🚀🎉🎉

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/magento/magento2
Language: php

All Submissions you make to Adobe Inc. and its affiliates, assigns and subsidiaries (collectively “Adobe”) are subject to the terms of the Adobe Contributor License Agreement.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pterodactyl/panel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pterodactyl/panel
Language: php
Pterodactyl® is a free, open-source game server management panel built with PHP, React, and Go. Designed with security in mind, Pterodactyl runs all game servers in isolated Docker containers while exposing a beautiful and intuitive UI to end users.
